guides.degree_title: Master of Science, Computer Science, Human-Computer Interaction
Bachelor of Science, Computer Science (BSCS to MSCS)
guides.low_detail: SP table column ordering failure — same class as BSITM and MATSPED. Parser recovered 30 rows but many have impossible CU/Term values. 8 sp_expected_term_got_text + 4 sp_row_invalid + 1 sp_incomplete_row_at_eof + 1 sp_row_invalid title-match failure. AoS content fully intact: 11 groups, 37 courses, 0 AoS anomalies. SP data must be excluded from downstream use. AoS is safe.

sp_format: All 5 guides nominally 3-column multiline (with Term). MSCSUG SP table has column extraction failure; format detection is correct but source columns are interleaved incorrectly. 4 pure MSCS guides parse cleanly.

metadata_format_variants.note: All 5 guides use header-line metadata format. All page_count=0 (expected for this format).

capstone_notes.note: Only MSCSIA has an explicit Capstone section. Capstone has 1 competency bullet. No competency trigger-based block — single bullet present. This is consistent with some graduate capstone formats (e.g., MSML in graduate_standard also had minimal capstone bullets).

structural_notes: MSCSIA is an older version (202306) vs the cohort of 3 guides at 202504. Different version, same parser behavior.
MSCSIA's 1-course-per-group structure is structurally unique within this family but parses identically to standard AoS parsing.

MSCSUG is a BSCS-to-MSCS bridge guide covering 37 courses — analogous to MSITUG in graduate_standard (35 courses). Unlike MSITUG, MSCSUG has SP column extraction failure. The large AoS parse (37 courses, 11 groups) is correct and useful.
The MSCSAIML title truncation ('...Artificial Intelligence and') affects only the degree_title field in the parsed JSON. SP, AoS, and metadata are all correct.

sp_column_extraction_failure.description: Source PDF column ordering failure during pdftotext extraction. Same failure class as BSITM and MATSPED. SP data is unusable. AoS content is intact and fully usable. No parser fix possible — source artifact.

safe_fields_for_downstream: SP course titles (MSCSIA, MSCSCS, MSCSAIML, MSCSHCI)
SP CU values (MSCSIA, MSCSCS, MSCSAIML, MSCSHCI)
SP term sequence (MSCSIA, MSCSCS, MSCSAIML, MSCSHCI)
fields_to_exclude: MSCSUG SP data — column extraction failure, invalid CU/Term values
MSCSAIML degree_title field — truncated by multi-line AoS header wrapping

recommendation.summary: 5/5 parsed, 0 failures. 4 HIGH / 0 MEDIUM / 1 LOW. LOW case (MSCSUG) is a source-artifact SP extraction failure — AoS content intact. No parser changes needed or made. Family structure matched gate expectations throughout.
recommendation.downstream_go_nogo: GO with exclusions — SP data for MSCSUG excluded; MSCSAIML degree_title field excluded. All AoS content safe for all 5 guides.
